coverage_note: The bundled PCSK9 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from PCSK9 LDL receptor trafficking, hepatic cholesterol homeostasis, secreted protease biology, and LDL-C regulation and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000169174: PCSK9 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: PCSK9 findings should be read against LDL receptor trafficking, hepatic cholesterol homeostasis, secreted protease biology, and LDL-C regulation; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs11591147 (PCSK9 R46L) is curated as a PCSK9 marker for LDL cholesterol and cardiovascular risk biology, Familial hypercholesterolemia review context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

PCSK9 gain-of-function model is curated as a PCSK9 marker for LDL cholesterol and cardiovascular risk biology, Familial hypercholesterolemia review context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
